name: The Hibachi (Kailua)
tagline: Windward side's hidden poke gem — assembled fresh to order right in front of you, with variety that puts the tourist spots to shame.
mustOrder: Fresh poke bowl — built to order with your choice of fish and toppings
Spicy ahi poke — creamy and flavorful, always a solid pick
Daily specials — ask what's new, they rotate preparations regularly
parking: Shopping center lot with ample parking
talkStory: A neighborhood poke and grill counter in Kailua that earned a loyal Windward side following by keeping prices fair, fish fresh, and preparations simple — the kind of spot regulars visit multiple times a week.
insiderTips: Check hours as they can vary. Lunch rush is the busiest — going mid-afternoon is the sweet spot. Watch them build your bowl and ask for recommendations on what fish came in fresh that day.
